mapper.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, barcode, product_name AS productName, product_image AS productImage, location_id AS locationId, zone_id AS zoneId FROM products WHERE barcode = #{barcode}
SELECT product_id AS productId, barcode, product_name AS productName, product_image AS productImage, location_id AS locationId, zone_id AS zoneId FROM products WHERE product_id = #{productId}
